Standard lateral design suggests mid-range commercial/office use furniture. No visible major damage but cosmetic wear consistent with office environment use.

deals.title: Graded Slabs for Trade
deals.notes: Appears to be a collection of 10 graded and slabbed trading cards (likely Pokemon based on visible artwork). Cards are encased in protective PSA/BGS graded slabs with visible grades. The condition of the slabs themselves appears good with minimal wear. Actual resale value depends heavily on: specific card identities, individual grades received, card rarity/desirability, and market demand for each particular card. Slabs are tradeable commodities with values ranging from $5-$500+ per card depending on grade and card type. Presented as a bulk lot for trade rather than sale, suggesting seller may be looking for other cards rather than cash.

deals.title: Buying old and new office computers / gaming computers
deals.model: OptiPlex (likely 7000 or 9000 series based on design)
deals.notes: Small form factor business/office desktop. Appears to be several years old but functional. Listing indicates buyer is purchasing used computers in bulk, suggesting this may be part of a corporate liquidation or bulk lot. Actual specifications (CPU, RAM, storage) cannot be determined from exterior photos alone, which affects resale value significantly. Condition shows normal wear consistent with office use.

deals.title: Collectible
deals.notes: This is a 1943 steel cent graded by ICG (Independent Coin Graders) with a grade of MS67 RD (Red/uncirculated condition). The 1943 steel pennies are historically significant World War II era coins. The MS67 grade indicates excellent condition, which adds to collectibility. The slab (holder) protects the coin and the grade certification adds premium value to collectors.

deals.title: 21 QT. Canner
deals.notes: Black metal pressure canner in functional condition. No visible damage from photo, but no detailed condition description provided in listing. Used for home canning/food preservation. Weight and capacity suggest mid-range residential model. Value depends on complete functionality of pressure valve and seals.
